market_summary: Asian markets rebounded significantly on March 24, 2026, following signals from President Trump regarding potential resolution of the conflict in Iran. Nikkei 225 rose 1.1%, Kospi increased 2.7%, and the Hang Seng jumped 2.2%. Oil prices also saw a gain.
art_highlight: The Korean art scene is active in March 2026, with major exhibitions like 'Sacred Paper: Korean Ritual Arts' at the Wang Center and the digital '20!2026 Art Seoul' exhibit promoting market transparency.
